title: Reader API Caching, ETags, Preconditions, and Invalidation · Contract Triage
summary: A preserved Go feed-service run contains one plausible discovery, URL, XML, normalization, fetch, SQL, transaction, lease, goroutine, handler, accessibility, migration, or release defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in privacy-safe conditional reader API and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence…
objectives: Classify public, tenant-private, user-private, sensitive, non-storeable, and invalidation-sensitive representations before fields are set.
Derive validators from authorized representation version, query, locale, content negotiation, and principal scope and choose weak or strong semantics.
Evaluate If-None-Match precedence and If-Modified-Since correctly after authentication and representation selection.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Feed Go Cache Classification
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go team handles case 4277 during a multilingual university archive import. Build deterministic Go evidence to reconcile private cache classification, ETags, conditional reads, write preconditions, and invalidation; untrusted XML and feed content must not cross admission or rendering boundaries; then change one artifact, deployment, incident, backup, restore, rollback, or capacity condition and reconcile the release. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Classify public, tenant-private, user-private, sensitive, non-storeable, and invalidation-sensitive representations before fields are set.

Inspect the Feed Go Cache Classification trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Feed Go Invalidation Proof
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-Go function headed "// Evidence: feed-go-invalidation-proof-1vkktt" that uses case 3084 to reconcile private cache classification, ETags, conditional reads, write preconditions, and invalidation. Return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not open sockets, resolve DNS, parse through native XML libraries, contact publishers, access PostgreSQL, read host files, handle real signals, launch unbounded goroutines, or claim race, load, accessibility, container, backup, restore, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Go 1.26.5, pgx 5.10.0, goose 3.27.2, PostgreSQL 18.4, original fixtures, controlled RoundTrippers and httptest servers, disposable databases, race and fuzz runs, subprocesses, inspected images, accessibility review, capacity, backup, restore, rollback, and release gates.
